_schema: Equipment. 6 condition subsystems (0-100). Mechanic sees all six; other backgrounds see summary_state derived from the worst subsystem (fine >60, worn >35, rough >15, failing <=15). Condition now DRIVES gameplay: breakdown odds (worse iron quits more), breakdown severity, field yield, and work cost. breakdown_profile weights the failure tier and its consequences. ALL NUMBERS PLACEHOLDER — Phase 5 economy re-derivation locks them (2026-07-06 freeze lift).

breakdown_profile._note: Shared severity table. weight picks the tier at breakdown; worse condition biases the pick toward the costly end (code). 'keep running' amplifies condition_hit and, after 3 ignores, forces the next failure to expensive. cost_dealer = Roy fixes it today; cost_self_parts = Mechanic self-fix; downtime_days = cost of letting it sit.
